# LinkedIn Draft - 2026-06-23

Cloudflare has launched temporary account functionality that allows creation of ephemeral, auto-expiring Cloudflare accounts for short-lived workloads.

Went through 40 links today. Here's what made the brief:

1. Temporary Cloudflare Accounts for AI agents
   Directly relevant to agent/automation workflows and ephemeral deployment patterns; useful for CalenCall, nightly-librarian, and any sandbox environments.

2. sqlite-utils 4.0rc1 adds migrations and nested transactions
   Native migrations in sqlite-utils reduce friction for lightweight Python backends using SQLite; avoids adding Alembic or custom migration scripts.

Full brief with all 40 researched links → https://thenightlylibrarian.com/briefs/2026-06-23
